basic_details.job_title: Zilla Panchayat Raichur Library Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Panchayat Raichur Library Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Zilla Panchayat Raichur. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Zilla Panchayat Raichur Library Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: OBC 43 years, SC/ST 45 years, Ex-servicemen 3 years service +3 years, PH 10 years, Widow 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: PUC, Certificate in Library Science, 3 months Computer Course
qualification.details: PUC pass with Library Science certificate and 3 months computer course.

selection_process: Merit based on PUC marks with Library Science and Computer certificates
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Zilla Panchayat Raichur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.zilla_panchayat_raichur: PUC, Certificate in Library Science, 3 months Computer Course

content_sections.heading: Zilla Panchayat Raichur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Zilla Panchayat Raichur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Zilla Panchayat Raichur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Zilla Panchayat Raichur Library Supervisor Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PUC pass with Library Science certificate and 3 months computer course.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: OBC 43 years, SC/ST 45 years, Ex-servicemen 3 years service +3 years, PH 10 years, Widow 10 years

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit based on PUC marks with Library Science and Computer certificates

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Zilla Panchayat Raichur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Zilla Panchayat Raichur Library Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Zilla Panchayat Raichur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Zilla Panchayat Raichur Library Supervisor posts is 29-07-2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years for all candidates applying for these positions. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Supervisor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed PUC, possess a Certificate in Library Science, and have completed a 3-month computer course to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Library Supervisor position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Library Supervisor post in Zilla Panchayat Raichur.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories is Rs. 500. SC/ST and PwBD candidates have reduced fees.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. OBC candidates can apply up to 43 years, SC/ST up to 45 years, and PwBD up to 10 years above the maximum age limit.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on merit, calculated from the marks obtained in PUC, along with the Library Science and Computer certificates.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Zilla Panchayat Raichur recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link between the start and end dates of the application period.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature, offering a fixed-term employment opportunity with Zilla Panchayat Raichur.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
